sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation

        print(f"Player: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check what changed
if last_transition:
    before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
    print(f"\nBefore nodes: {len(before['nodes'])}, After nodes: {len(after['nodes'])}")
    # Find player in before and after
    for n in before['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24:
            print(f"Before player: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    for n in after['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24:
            print(f"After player: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
